input_data.idea: AI-powered task management for remote teams

pain_points: Project timeline drift due to timezone lag
market_analysis.positioning_opportunity: The 'Zero-Management' Layer: AI that updates task status, re-prioritizes based on Slack/Zoom transcripts, and predicts delays before they happen.

high_leverage_moves: Direct integration with Slack/Teams to ingest 'unstructured work' and convert to 'structured tasks' automatically.

tiers.name: Enterprise
features: Dedicated AI Training on Company Data

pricing_model.monetization_strategy: SaaS per-seat model with an 'AI Agent' add-on for high-volume data ingestion.

business_model.core_offer: Autonomous Task Orchestration for Remote Teams
business_model.delivery_model: Cloud-based Web App + Native Desktop/Mobile + Slack/Teams Bot
business_model.retention_model: Institutional Knowledge Lock-in (the AI learns the team's specific workflow over time)
business_model.expansion_model: Departmental land-and-expand via viral collaboration features.

dependencies: Stable API access to Slack/Google/Microsoft ecosystems

critical_path: Achieving <5% error rate in AI task extraction to build user trust.

forecast.revenue_projection: Year 1: $150k ARR (Beta phase); Year 2: $1.2M ARR (Market penetration)
risks: Data privacy concerns regarding AI reading team chats

middle_of_funnel: Interactive demo with sample team data
bottom_of_funnel: ROI calculator for manager time savings

pre_launch: Engage with 'Remote Work' influencers on X/LinkedIn
launch: Cold outreach to CTOs of YC/Techstars startups
